name: field-mapper
title: Fuse FieldMapper
description: Fuse-canon CSV column → enrichment field mapper. Phase 1 port of fire-enrich's field-mapper.tsx extended with: (1) key column selector at top — user picks which CSV column contains the partner's domain/website; auto-selected via fuzzy match on headers like "domain", "website", "url", "company_url"; (2) auto-mapped presets — presets whose displayName fuzzy-matches a CSV column are pre-selected on mount; (3) free-form field add — inline form opens from "+ Add field" accepting displayName, description, type. Pure CRUD surface (no AI). Sentence case everywhere per HR 4, 2px radius on chips (HR 23 step 5 grep gate), brand-tinted selected state via --ai-tint CSS variable. Source: fuse-web components/csv/field-mapper.tsx.
